## Meeting Purpose

[Sync on content pipeline, holiday schedule, and upcoming website migration.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [**Content Focus:** Prioritizing refreshes for Oil & Gas, Petrochem, and LNG to unblock Tara's campaign guide development.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
  - [**Website Migration:** Imubit is moving from a fragile WordPress site with extensive page duplication to Webflow. Matt will consult GrowthX directors on managing the expected traffic dip.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1046.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:** The weekly sync is canceled for Dec 25. Publishing continues through Dec 26, then pauses completely from Dec 29–Jan 2.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
  - [**Q1 Strategy:** The new year will bring a content calibration to align with Imubit's new messaging, including a focus on "Workforce Transformation."](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)

## Topics

### Website Migration & SEO Impact

  - [**Problem:** The current WordPress site is fragile and has extensive page duplication from a prior redesign, creating SEO risk.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
  - [**Solution:** Migrating to Webflow to create a leaner, more performant site.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Phase 1 (Complete):** Platform migration.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1081.0)
      - [**Phase 2 (In Progress):** Redesigning the homepage and internal pages (e.g., article templates).](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1112.0)
      - [**Phase 3 (Post-Launch):** Updating site messaging to reflect a new strategic direction.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1146.0)
  - [**SEO Concern:** The migration will remove thousands of duplicate pages, which is expected to cause a significant, temporary traffic dip.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1494.0)
  - [**GrowthX Support:** Matt will consult GrowthX directors for best practices on managing the migration's SEO impact.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
  - [**Technical Audit:** GrowthX will conduct a technical audit of the new Webflow site in Q1 to identify further optimization opportunities.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1473.0)

### Content Strategy & Performance

  - [**Priority Refreshes:** Tara needs content refreshes for three verticals to unblock her campaign guide development.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=693.0)
      - [**Oil & Gas:** 3 articles in production now; Tara will receive them Monday.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)
      - [**Petrochem:** 3 articles will be refreshed next week.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [**LNG:** No refresh needed; 2 articles from November are current. Matt sent links for Tara's review.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
  - [**Q1 Content Calibration:** A session will be held in early January to align content strategy with Imubit's new messaging.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1684.0)
      - [**New Focus:** "Workforce Transformation" will be a major theme.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1724.0)
      - [**New Inputs:** Tara will provide content ideas from upcoming initiatives (e.g., podcasts, webinars).](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1741.0)
  - [**Performance Insight:** Matt shared a Looker dashboard (GA4 + GSC) showing an August article ("industrial AI oil and gas") is top-of-SERP and generating an LLM citation.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=864.0)

### Logistics & Holiday Schedule

  - [**Meeting Time:** The weekly sync is permanently moved 30 minutes earlier to accommodate Matt's GTM meeting.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [**Holiday Schedule:**](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [**Dec 19:** Matt sends a recap and production plan before his OOO.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=491.0)
      - [**Dec 22–26 (Christmas Week):** Publishing continues. The ME will post a Slack update when content is sent for publishing.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=457.0)
      - [**Dec 29–Jan 2 (New Year's Week):** Complete pause on content generation, publishing, and syncs.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [**Jan 4:** Matt returns.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

## Next Steps

  - [**Matt:**](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=642.0)

      - [Schedule 3 Petrochem refreshes for next week.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=841.0)
      - [Consult GrowthX directors on website migration SEO best practices.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=1575.0)
      - [Send a Slack update with the holiday schedule.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)
      - [Update the recurring meeting invite with the new time.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=414.0)
  - [**Tara:**](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
      - [Review the 2 LNG articles and confirm no refresh is needed.](https://fathom.video/share/BY3EzeByX_kuJ_voV8wzgE93oygMdxJ9?tab=summary&timestamp=793.0)
